# Pyreon Framework

> Signal-based UI framework for TypeScript. SSR, SSG, islands, SPA. Standard JSX + TypeScript.
> Fastest framework on all JS Framework Benchmark tests.

## Signals (reactivity)

```typescript
import { signal, computed, effect, batch } from "@pyreon/reactivity"

const count = signal(0)       // create
count()                        // read (subscribes)
count.set(5)                   // write
count.update(n => n + 1)       // update
count.peek()                   // read without subscribing

const doubled = computed(() => count() * 2)  // auto-tracks deps
effect(() => console.log(count()))           // runs when count changes
batch(() => { a.set(1); b.set(2) })          // single notification
```

## Components

```typescript
// Components are plain functions that run ONCE
const Counter = (props: { initial: number }) => {
  const count = signal(props.initial)
  return <button onClick={() => count.update(n => n + 1)}>{count()}</button>
}
```

## Conditional Rendering

```typescript
import { Show, Switch, Match } from "@pyreon/core"

<Show when={isLoggedIn()} fallback={<Login />}>
  <Dashboard />
</Show>
```

## List Rendering

```typescript
import { For } from "@pyreon/core"

// Use "by" not "key" (JSX reserves "key" for VNode reconciliation)
<For each={items()} by={item => item.id}>
  {item => <li>{item.name}</li>}
</For>
```

## Lifecycle

```typescript
import { onMount, onUnmount, provide } from "@pyreon/core"
import { onCleanup } from "@pyreon/reactivity"

onMount(() => {
  const id = setInterval(tick, 1000)
  return () => clearInterval(id)  // optional cleanup
})
```

## Context

```typescript
import { createContext, useContext, provide } from "@pyreon/core"

const Theme = createContext<"light" | "dark">("light")

// Provide (auto-cleans up on unmount):
provide(Theme, "dark")

// Consume:
const theme = useContext(Theme)
```

## Smart `class` with `cx()`

```typescript
import { cx } from "@pyreon/core"

// Strings, arrays, objects, nested mix ŌĆö all work:
<div class="base active" />
<div class={["base", isActive() && "active"]} />
<div class={{ base: true, active: isActive() }} />
<div class={cx("base", isActive() && "active", { bold: isBold() })} />
```

## Props Utilities

```typescript
import { splitProps, mergeProps, createUniqueId } from "@pyreon/core"

// Split props preserving reactivity:
const [local, rest] = splitProps(props, ["class", "style"])

// Merge default props:
const merged = mergeProps({ size: "md", variant: "primary" }, props)

// SSR-safe unique IDs:
const id = createUniqueId()  // "pyreon-1", "pyreon-2", etc.
```

## Typed Events

```typescript
// TargetedEvent types currentTarget per element ŌĆö no casts needed:
<input onInput={(e: TargetedEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
  console.log(e.currentTarget.value)  // typed!
}} />
```

## Effect Cleanup

```typescript
import { effect, onCleanup } from "@pyreon/reactivity"

effect(() => {
  const handler = () => console.log(count())
  window.addEventListener("resize", handler)
  onCleanup(() => window.removeEventListener("resize", handler))
})
```

## Routing

```typescript
import { createRouter, RouterProvider, RouterView, RouterLink, useRouter, useRoute, useTypedSearchParams, useTransition, useMiddlewareData } from "@pyreon/router"

const router = createRouter([
  { path: "/", component: Home },
  { path: "/user/:id", component: User, loader: ({ params }) => fetchUser(params.id) },
])

<RouterProvider router={router}>
  <RouterLink to="/">Home</RouterLink>
  <RouterView />
</RouterProvider>

// Navigation:
const router = useRouter()
router.push("/settings")
router.back()
```

## Head Management

```typescript
import { useHead } from "@pyreon/head"

useHead({ title: "Page Title", meta: [{ name: "description", content: "..." }] })
useHead(() => ({ title: `${name()} ŌĆö Profile` }))  // reactive
```

## SSR

```typescript
import { createHandler } from "@pyreon/server"

export default createHandler({ App, routes, mode: "stream" })
```

## Islands (Partial Hydration)

```typescript
import { island } from "@pyreon/server"

const SearchBar = island(() => import("./SearchBar"), { name: "SearchBar", hydrate: "visible" })
```

## Mount (Client)

```typescript
import { mount } from "@pyreon/runtime-dom"

mount(<App />, document.getElementById("app")!)
```

## Common Mistakes ŌĆö NEVER DO THIS

### Signals
- `{count}` ŌåÆ `{count()}` ŌĆö signals are functions, call them to read
- `signal(5)` ŌåÆ `signal.set(5)` ŌĆö calling signal with args does NOT write (dev mode warns)
- `.value` ŌåÆ signals are callable, not `.value` getters (that's Vue)
- `useState` ŌåÆ `signal()`, `useEffect` ŌåÆ `effect()` or `onMount()`
- `memo(Component)` ŌåÆ not needed, components run once in Pyreon

### JSX
- `key={...}` on `<For>` ŌåÆ use `by={...}` prop (`key` is reserved for VNode reconciliation)
- `className` ŌåÆ `class`, `htmlFor` ŌåÆ `for` (standard HTML attributes)
- `onChange` on `<input>` ŌåÆ `onInput` for keypress-by-keypress (native DOM events)
- `.map()` in JSX ŌåÆ use `<For>` for reactive list rendering
- `class="a b"` works, but for conditional classes use `class={["a", cond && "b"]}` or `cx()`

### Props & Reactivity
- `const { state } = props` ŌåÆ BREAKS REACTIVITY! Destructuring captures once. Use `props.state` for reactive access
- `const x = props.y` in JSX is NOW REACTIVE ŌĆö compiler inlines `props.y` at JSX use sites (text + attributes). Transitive: `const a = props.x; const b = a + 1` inlines as `((props.x) + 1)`. Only `const` tracked (`let`/`var` excluded). Non-JSX usage stays static.
- For rest props with reactivity: `const [own, rest] = splitProps(props, ['state', 'size'])` ŌĆö preserves getters
- Component props with signal reads ARE reactive (compiler wraps with _rp): `<Button state={isActive() ? 'primary' : 'default'} />` updates without remount
- Single JSX element props are stable: `<Wrapper icon={<Icon name={x()} />} />` ŌĆö Icon created once, name updates reactively
- Conditional JSX props remount: `<Wrapper icon={show() ? <Icon /> : null} />` ŌĆö correct, different VNode types

### Context & Effects
- `const { mode } = useContext(ctx)` ŌåÆ BREAKS REACTIVITY! Destructuring captures once. Keep reference: `const ctx = useContext(Ctx)` then `ctx.mode`
- `effect(() => { effect(() => ...) })` ŌåÆ NEVER nest effects. Use `computed()` for derived values
- `.peek()` inside effects/computeds ŌåÆ bypasses tracking, creates stale reads

### Providers
- Use `<PyreonUI theme={theme} mode="light">` ŌĆö this is the ONLY provider you need
- Do NOT use `UnistyleProvider`, `ThemeProvider`, or `CoreProvider` directly ŌĆö they are internal

### Other
- `(e.target as HTMLInputElement)` ŌåÆ use `TargetedEvent<HTMLInputElement>` for typed `currentTarget`
- `onMount(() => { doStuff() })` ŌåÆ can optionally return a cleanup function
- `onClick={maybeUndefined}` ŌåÆ safe (runtime bails), but be aware the handler is checked at assignment time

## UI System (12 packages)

- @pyreon/ui-core ŌĆö Config engine, init(), PyreonUI provider, useMode(), utilities
- @pyreon/styler ŌĆö CSS-in-JS: styled(), css, keyframes, theming
- @pyreon/unistyle ŌĆö Responsive breakpoints, CSS property mappings, enrichTheme()
- @pyreon/hooks ŌĆö 33+ signal-based hooks (useHover, useFocus, useBreakpoint, useClipboard, useDialog, useTimeAgo, useOnline, useEventListener, useInfiniteScroll, etc.)
- @pyreon/elements ŌĆö Foundational primitives (Element, Text, List, Overlay, Portal)
- @pyreon/attrs ŌĆö Chainable HOC factory (.attrs(), .config())
- @pyreon/rocketstyle ŌĆö Multi-state styling (states, sizes, variants, themes, dark mode)
- @pyreon/coolgrid ŌĆö 12-column responsive grid (Container, Row, Col)
- @pyreon/kinetic ŌĆö CSS-transition animations (Transition, Stagger, Collapse)
- @pyreon/kinetic-presets ŌĆö 120+ animation presets
- @pyreon/connector-document ŌĆö Bridge to @pyreon/document
- @pyreon/document-primitives ŌĆö 18 rocketstyle document components, render in browser AND export to 14+ formats via the same tree. `extractDocNode(templateFn)` one-step extraction. `DocDocument` accepts reactive accessors for title/author/subject (resolved at export time)

```typescript
// PyreonUI ŌĆö unified provider (replaces 3 separate providers)
import { PyreonUI, useMode } from "@pyreon/ui-core"
import { enrichTheme } from "@pyreon/unistyle"

const theme = enrichTheme({ colors: { primary: "#3b82f6" } })

const App = () => (
  <PyreonUI theme={theme} mode="system">
    <MyApp />
  </PyreonUI>
)

// Read resolved mode anywhere:
const mode = useMode()  // "light" | "dark" (reactive signal)
```

## Ecosystem Packages (20)

- @pyreon/store ŌĆö Global state management with composition stores (`defineStore`)
- @pyreon/state-tree ŌĆö Structured reactive models with snapshots and patches
- @pyreon/form ŌĆö Signal-based form management with fields, validation, arrays
- @pyreon/validation ŌĆö Schema adapters (Zod, Valibot, ArkType)
- @pyreon/query ŌĆö TanStack Query adapter with signal-driven results + WebSocket subscriptions + SSE (useSSE)
- @pyreon/table ŌĆö TanStack Table adapter with reactive options
- @pyreon/virtual ŌĆö TanStack Virtual adapter for element and window virtualization
- @pyreon/i18n ŌĆö Reactive i18n with async namespace loading, plurals, interpolation. Two entry points: `@pyreon/i18n` (full, includes JSX components) and `@pyreon/i18n/core` (framework-agnostic, for backends / non-JSX consumers ŌĆö only depends on @pyreon/reactivity)
- @pyreon/feature ŌĆö Schema-driven CRUD primitives (`defineFeature` ŌåÆ queries, forms, tables, store)
- @pyreon/charts ŌĆö Reactive ECharts bridge with lazy loading and auto module detection
- @pyreon/storage ŌĆö Reactive client storage (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies, IndexedDB)
- @pyreon/hotkeys ŌĆö Keyboard shortcut management with scopes and conflict detection
- @pyreon/permissions ŌĆö Reactive permissions (RBAC, ABAC, feature flags, subscription tiers)
- @pyreon/machine ŌĆö Reactive state machines ŌĆö constrained signals with type-safe transitions
- @pyreon/flow ŌĆö Reactive flow diagrams: createFlow<TData> generic over node data shape, custom node renderers via nodeTypes, NodeComponentProps.selected/dragging are reactive accessors (parent runs once across selection clicks), auto-layout via lazy-loaded elkjs (peerDep: @pyreon/runtime-dom). LayoutOptions: `direction`/`layerSpacing`/`edgeRouting` apply to `layered`/`tree` only and are silently ignored by `force`/`stress`/`radial`/`box`/`rectpacking`; `nodeSpacing` applies to all algorithms.
- @pyreon/code ŌĆö Reactive code editor with CodeMirror 6 ŌĆö writable Signal<string> for two-way binding, `bindEditorToSignal({ editor, signal, serialize, parse, onParseError? })` helper for two-way externalŌåöeditor binding with built-in loop prevention, minimap, diff/tabbed editors, lazy-loaded language grammars (peerDep: @pyreon/runtime-dom)
- @pyreon/document ŌĆö Universal document rendering ŌĆö one template, 14+ output formats
- @pyreon/rx ŌĆö Signal-aware reactive transforms (filter, map, sortBy, groupBy, pipe, debounce, throttle, 24 functions)
- @pyreon/toast ŌĆö Toast notifications (toast(), toast.success/error/warning/info/loading, Toaster component, a11y)
- @pyreon/url-state ŌĆö URL-synced state (useUrlState with auto type coercion, schema mode, SSR-safe)
- @pyreon/storybook ŌĆö Storybook renderer for Pyreon components
- @pyreon/lint ŌĆö Pyreon-specific linter ŌĆö 58 rules (reactivity, JSX, SSR, performance, architecture, router, etc.), config files, watch mode, AST cache, CLI + API, powered by oxc-parser. Includes `pyreon/no-process-dev-gate` (auto-fixable) ŌĆö flags `typeof process !== 'undefined' && process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'` dev gates that are dead code in real Vite browser bundles; use `import.meta.env?.DEV === true` instead. Per-rule options via ESLint-style tuple form (`"pyreon/no-window-in-ssr": ["error", { "exemptPaths": ["src/foundation/"] }]`) with `meta.schema` validation; JSON Schema at `@pyreon/lint/schema/pyreonlintrc.schema.json` for IDE autocomplete; CLI `--rule-options id='{json}'`; config-level diagnostics surface on `LintResult.configDiagnostics`.

## Zero (Full-Stack Framework)

@pyreon/zero ŌĆö full-stack meta-framework built on Pyreon + Vite:
- Client-safe main entry: `@pyreon/zero` = client components only, `@pyreon/zero/server` = server-only
- File-system routing (src/routes/) with layouts, error boundaries, loading states, 404 pages
- SSR + SSG + ISR rendering modes
- API routes (src/routes/api/) with typed handlers
- Image optimization ŌĆö responsive srcset, blur placeholders, WebP/AVIF, lazy loading
- Favicon generation ŌĆö single source SVG/PNG ŌåÆ ICO, Apple touch, manifest, dark mode SVG
- Locale-aware favicons ŌĆö `faviconPlugin({ locales: { de: { source: "./icon-de.svg" } } })`
- OG image generation ŌĆö `ogImagePlugin({ templates, locales })`
- Reactive favicon switching ŌĆö dual light/dark PNG/ICO with theme-synced media attribute swap
- Meta component ŌĆö declarative OG (og:image:width/height, og:video, og:audio), noIndex, ogTemplate, favicon prop
- I18n routing ŌĆö locale detection (Accept-Language + cookie), prefix strategies, useLocale()
- Font optimization ŌĆö Google Fonts, local fonts, font-display, fallback metrics
- Theme ŌĆö dark/light toggle with FOUC prevention script
- Middleware composition ŌĆö compose(), shared context, CORS, cache, compression, rate limiting
- CSP middleware ŌĆö `cspMiddleware({ directives })` with `useNonce()` for inline scripts
- Env validation ŌĆö `validateEnv({ PORT: 3000, DEBUG: false, API_KEY: String })`, `publicEnv()`
- Request logging ŌĆö `loggerMiddleware()`
- AI integration ŌĆö `aiPlugin()` for llms.txt, JSON-LD inference, AI plugin manifest
- `useRequestLocals()` ŌĆö bridge middleware locals into component tree
- SEO ŌĆö sitemap.xml, robots.txt, JSON-LD helpers
- Dev error overlay with stack traces
- Adapters ŌĆö Node, Bun, static, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, Netlify Functions
- Layouts use `<RouterView />` (not props.children)

## Key Ecosystem Patterns

```typescript
// State management
import { defineStore } from '@pyreon/store'
const useCounter = defineStore('counter', () => {
  const count = signal(0)
  const increment = () => count.update(n => n + 1)
  return { count, increment }
})

// Forms
import { useForm, useField } from '@pyreon/form'
const form = useForm({ initialValues: { name: '' }, onSubmit: (v) => save(v) })
const name = useField(form, 'name')

// Permissions
import { createPermissions } from '@pyreon/permissions'
const can = createPermissions({ 'posts.read': true, 'posts.delete': (post) => post.authorId === userId })

// State machines
import { createMachine } from '@pyreon/machine'
const light = createMachine({ initial: 'red', states: { red: { on: { NEXT: 'green' } }, green: { on: { NEXT: 'yellow' } }, yellow: { on: { NEXT: 'red' } } } })

// Document rendering
import { createDocument } from '@pyreon/document'
const doc = createDocument({ title: 'Report' }).heading('Sales').table({ columns: ['Region', 'Revenue'], rows: [['US', '$1M']] })
await doc.toPdf()   // PDF
await doc.toEmail() // Outlook-safe HTML
await doc.toSlack() // Slack Block Kit JSON

// Reactive transforms
import { filter, pipe, sortBy } from '@pyreon/rx'
const items = signal([{ name: 'B', age: 30 }, { name: 'A', age: 25 }])
const adults = filter(items, i => i.age >= 18)  // Computed<Item[]>
const sorted = pipe(items, sortBy('name'), filter(i => i.age > 20))

// Toast notifications
import { toast, Toaster } from '@pyreon/toast'
toast.success('Saved!')
toast.promise(saveData(), { loading: 'Saving...', success: 'Done!', error: 'Failed' })

// URL-synced state
import { useUrlState } from '@pyreon/url-state'
const page = useUrlState('page', 1)     // synced to ?page=
const filters = useUrlState({ page: 1, sort: 'name' })  // schema mode

// SSE subscription
import { useSSE } from '@pyreon/query'
const { data } = useSSE({ queryKey: ['events'], url: '/api/events' })

// Active route detection
import { useIsActive } from '@pyreon/router'
const isAdmin = useIsActive('/admin')  // reactive boolean

// Typed search params with auto-coercion
import { useTypedSearchParams } from '@pyreon/router'
const params = useTypedSearchParams({ page: 'number', q: 'string' })
params.page()  // number

// Route transition state
import { useTransition } from '@pyreon/router'
const { isTransitioning } = useTransition()

// View Transitions API ŌĆö auto-enabled, opt out per route:
{ path: '/modal', component: Modal, meta: { viewTransition: false } }

// Middleware chain with data passing
const auth: RouteMiddleware = async (ctx) => { ctx.data.user = await getUser(ctx.request) }
// In component: const data = useMiddlewareData<{ user: User }>()
```

## Documentation

Full docs at `docs/` (VitePress site, 52 pages): `cd docs && bun run dev`

## AI Tools

- `pyreon doctor --json` ŌĆö scan project for React patterns, get structured fix suggestions
- `pyreon doctor --fix` ŌĆö auto-fix React patterns to Pyreon equivalents
- `pyreon context` ŌĆö generate .pyreon/context.json with routes, components, islands
- MCP server: `bunx @pyreon/mcp` ŌĆö live API lookup, validation, migration, diagnostics
